newsArray.description: England pacer Jofra Archer returns to the shortest format following an impressive Test series against New Zealand, where he was named Player of the Series despite featuring in only two of the three matches.

newsArray.title: England Announces ODI Squad for Series Against India Starting July 14
newsArray.description: England has announced a 16-player squad for the upcoming ODI series against India, starting on July 14 at Edgbaston. The squad includes uncapped all-rounder James Coles and fast bowler Josh Tongue, both eager to make their ODI debuts. Captain Harry Brook leads a team featuring seasoned players like Jos Buttler and Joe Root. The series follows England's recent 2-1 ODI victory over Sri Lanka. Meanwhile, India is currently engaged in a T20I series, with the first match ending in a no-result due to rain. The ODI series schedule includes matches at Edgbaston, Cardiff, and Lord's.
creator: narendra chaudhary
